paper_metadata.title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
paper_metadata.abstract: This report introduces a new family of multimodal models, Gemini, that exhibit remarkable capabilities across image, audio, video, and text understanding. The Gemini family consists of Ultra, Pro, and Nano sizes, suitable for applications ranging from complex reasoning tasks to on-device memory-constrained use-cases. Evaluation on a broad range of benchmarks shows that our most-capable Gemini Ultra model advances the state of the art in 30 of 32 of these benchmarks - notably being the first model to achieve human-expert performance on the well-studied exam benchmark MMLU, and improving the state of the art in every one of the 20 multimodal benchmarks we examined. We believe that the new capabilities of the Gemini family in cross-modal reasoning and language understanding will enable a wide variety of use cases. We discuss our approach toward post-training and deploying Gemini models responsibly to users through services including Gemini, Gemini Advanced, Google AI Studio, and Cloud Vertex AI.

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini is a family of state-of-the-art language models trained jointly across image, audio, video, and text data for building a model with strong generalist capabilities across modalities alongside cutting-edge understanding and reasoning performance in each respective domain.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, video data
extraction_data.extension: Gemini Ultra has safety fine-tuning and safety filters applied by default, and the ability to configure some sampling parameters, such as temperature, token limit, Top-k, and Top-p.
extraction_data.application: Accelerating research on language models, building block in features within Google products, Search Generative Experience
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models are natively multimodal, trained jointly across text, image, audio, and video, and set a new state of the art across a wide range of text, image, audio, and video benchmarks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text, image, audio, and video datasets
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal learning, text, image, audio, and video understanding
extraction_data.application: Text, image, audio, and video understanding, reasoning, reading comprehension, STEM, and coding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models exhibit remarkable capabilities across image, audio, video, and text understanding, with a uniform performance lift for video question answering and audio understanding benchmarks.
extraction_data.application: On-device deployment, summarization, reading comprehension, text completion tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal model architecture, which enables the model to perform a wide range of tasks, including text, vision, and multimodal tasks. This is achieved through a combination of a large-scale language model and a multimodal encoder.
extraction_data.application: Text generation, question answering, text classification, multimodal tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal model architecture, which enables the model to perform a wide range of tasks, including text, vision, and multimodal tasks. This is achieved through a combination of a large-scale language model and a multimodal encoder.
extraction_data.application: Text generation, question answering, text classification, multimodal tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal model architecture, which enables the model to perform a wide range of tasks, including text, vision, and multimodal tasks. This is achieved through a combination of a large-scale language model and a multimodal encoder.
extraction_data.application: Text generation, question answering, text classification, multimodal tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal approach, enabling the model to process and understand both text and images. This method allows the model to learn from a diverse range of data sources and improve its overall performance.
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, image recognition, multimodal tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal approach, enabling the model to process and understand both text and images. This method allows the model to learn from a diverse range of data sources and improve its overall performance.
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, image recognition, multimodal tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini is a family of highly capable multimodal models that can perform a wide range of tasks, including language understanding, visual question answering, and multimodal reasoning. The primary innovation is the use of a combination of encoder and decoder architectures, which enables the model to handle both text and image inputs.
extraction_data.application: Language understanding, visual question answering, multimodal reasoning
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini is a family of highly capable multimodal models that can perform a wide range of tasks, including answering questions, generating text, and completing tasks.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
